name: RMW - M4A1
author: Mr. Rubyyy
description: Rubyyy's Modular Weaponry - M4A1 is the Military Designation for the M4 Carbine, which is a rifle that has been and is stil seen everywhere around the World, where there is a conflict of any sorts. Personal Favorite of mine. Eugene Stoner was really a genious. >CONTROLS< : [MMB-Fire Selector] [RMB-Aim Down Sight] [R-Reload] [T-Attachment Menu] [SHIFT-Canting/Sprint]
